text.div:
This value set includes codes based on the following rules:

  • Import all the codes that are contained in http://hl7.org/fhir/us/mcode/ValueSet/mcode-primary-malignant-neoplasm-disorder-vs
  • Import all the codes that are contained in http://hl7.org/fhir/us/mcode/ValueSet/mcode-hypereosinophilic-syndrome-disorder-vs
  • Import all the codes that are contained in http://hl7.org/fhir/us/mcode/ValueSet/mcode-carcinoma-in-situ-disorder-vs
  • Import all the codes that are contained in http://hl7.org/fhir/us/mcode/ValueSet/mcode-melanoma-in-situ-disorder-vs
  • Import all the codes that are contained in http://hl7.org/fhir/us/mcode/ValueSet/mcode-benign-uncertain-neoplasm-brain-cns-disorder-vs
  • Import all the codes that are contained in http://hl7.org/fhir/us/mcode/ValueSet/mcode-cytologic-evidence-malignancy-vs

name: PrimaryCancerDisorderVS
title: Primary Cancer Disorder Value Set
description: Types of primary malignant neoplastic disease, coded in SNOMED CT or ICD-10-CM.
copyright: This value set includes content from SNOMED CT, which is copyright © 2002+ International Health Terminology Standards Development Organisation (IHTSDO), and distributed by agreement between IHTSDO and HL7. Implementer use of SNOMED CT is not covered by this agreement
